note: Draft dataset for the Type Radar calibration photos (see TYPE_RADAR_PRODUCT_SPEC.md). briefRu = founder review checklist per photo; prompt = Midjourney v6 (--ar 3:4 --style raw) / for Flux drop the -- params and keep the descriptive text. After photo approval this file is compiled into packages/shared/src/type-radar.ts (ids + attrs + chips only). Ambiguity is resolved primarily by the reasonChips attribution layer (Ditto pattern); contrastPairs are a FALLBACK and may not need to be generated for v1.
commonChecksRu: Для КАЖДОГО фото: выглядит как ЛЮБИТЕЛЬСКИЙ кадр, снятый другом/подругой на телефон — лёгкая небрежность кадрирования, без профессионального света, без студийного глянца и без 'фотосессионной' позы (селфи на фронталку НЕ используем: кадр по грудь + ракурс сверху — не читается фигура); одна и та же живая сцена на весь сет — вечернее уютное кафе/бар, тёплый свет, человек СТОИТ/облокотился на стойку (НЕ сидит за столом — сидя не читается фигура); фон в лёгком размытии и БЕЗ других людей в кадре (антураж даёт вайб, но не крадёт внимание и не добавляет шума); кадр three-quarter (от середины бедра и выше — фигура должна читаться); взгляд в камеру, лёгкая искренняя улыбка 'встречает того, с кем пришёл(ла) на встречу' — выражение ОДИНАКОВОЕ по всему сету, вайб различается только одеждой/стилем; макияж одинаковый; руки открыты (короткий рукав/без рукавов), чтобы тату было видно или его отсутствие было проверяемо; уровень привлекательности сопоставимый по всему сету — симпатичный 'человек из жизни', НЕ глянцевая модель (иначе тестируем красоту, а не типаж); возраст 23–26; никаких очков, шляп, крупных аксессуаров.

reasonChips.note: Ditto-pattern attribution layer: a one-tap 'why?' after a verdict. Shown after the FIRST 2 verdicts (teaching moment) and after model-surprising verdicts only; hard cap 4 per session; always skippable. Effect on learning: a named attribute chip boosts that attribute's weight for this card and discounts the others; 'face'/'badPhoto' EXCLUDE the card from attribute learning (explicit noise channel); 'wholeVibe' = uniform update (as if no chip). loggedOnly chips are recorded for v2 research, never scored (socialRole precedent). Chips reweight ONE card; they never override set-level statistics.

promptScaffold.female: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, {BUILD}, {HAIR}, wearing {OUTFIT}, {TATTOO}, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw
promptScaffold.male: candid unposed photo of a 26-year-old man taken by a friend on a smartphone, {BUILD}, {HAIR}, {BEARD}, wearing {OUTFIT}, {TATTOO}, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a calm easy smile as if greeting someone he came to meet, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive guy-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw

photos.briefRu: Гипотеза: классически-женственный «мягкий» типаж — длинные светлые волосы, стройная фигура, элегантный стиль. Проверь: блонд однозначный (не русый), волосы ниже лопаток, силуэт читаемо стройный, простое чёрное платье без принтов, руки без тату.
photos.prompt: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, slender petite build, long straight golden-blonde hair, wearing a simple fitted black slip dress with thin straps, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw

photos.briefRu: Гипотеза: «фитнес-девушка» — спортивная брюнетка. Проверь: подтянутость видна (плечи/талия), но без бодибилдерского рельефа; волосы явно тёмные и длинные; спортивный верх простой, без логотипов; без тату.
photos.prompt: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, toned athletic build with defined shoulders and waist, long wavy dark-brown hair, wearing a fitted white ribbed tank top and high-waist track pants, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw

photos.briefRu: Гипотеза: альтернативный типаж — рыжий боб + тату + дерзкая одежда. Проверь: рыжий натуральный медный (не морковно-крашеный), боб до подбородка, тату-рукав читается на правом предплечье, чёрная футболка.
photos.prompt: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, slender petite build, a chin-length natural copper-red bob, wearing a black band t-shirt with rolled short sleeves, layered silver necklaces and dark jeans, a delicate fine-line tattoo sleeve clearly visible on her right forearm, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw

photos.briefRu: Гипотеза: элегантная фигуристая брюнетка с каре. Проверь: формы читаются именно как curvy/песочные часы (не полнота и не slim), каре аккуратное тёмное, классическое платье, без тату.
photos.prompt: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, soft curvy full-figured hourglass build, a sleek chin-length dark-brown bob, wearing a simple fitted black slip dress with thin straps, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw

photos.briefRu: Гипотеза: контраст «нежный блонд × жёсткий стиль» — дерзкая спортивная блондинка с бобом и тату. Проверь: блонд-боб, фигура подтянутая, тату на предплечье видно, edgy-одежда чёрная.

contrastPairs.briefRu: Уточняет: цвет волос. Два кадра ДОЛЖНЫ различаться только цветом (брюнетка vs блондинка): одно лицо, одна поза, одна одежда, одна фигура. Проверь, что ничего кроме цвета волос не поменялось.
contrastPairs.promptBase: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, slender petite build, long straight {dark-brown | golden-blonde} hair, wearing a fitted white ribbed tank top and high-waist track pants, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw --seed 41001
contrastPairs.technique: Both frames from the same seed (and --cref of frame A in Midjourney); swap only the hair-color words.

contrastPairs.briefRu: Уточняет: фигуру. Стройная vs фигуристая при идентичных волосах/платье/лице. Проверь: разница фигур очевидна, но лицо и всё остальное максимально совпадает.
contrastPairs.promptBase: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, {slender petite build | soft curvy full-figured hourglass build}, long wavy dark-brown hair, wearing a simple fitted black slip dress with thin straps, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw --seed 41002
contrastPairs.technique: Same seed + cref; swap only the build descriptor.

contrastPairs.briefRu: Уточняет: отношение к тату. Один и тот же кадр с тату-рукавом и без. Проверь: тату — единственное отличие; рука хорошо видна в обоих кадрах.
contrastPairs.promptBase: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, toned athletic build with defined shoulders and waist, long straight golden-blonde hair, wearing a fitted white ribbed tank top and high-waist track pants, {a delicate fine-line tattoo sleeve clearly visible on her right forearm | bare arms with no tattoos}, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw --seed 41003
contrastPairs.technique: Same seed + cref; swap only the tattoo clause. Alternatively: inpaint the tattoo onto frame B.

contrastPairs.briefRu: Уточняет: длину волос. Длинные vs боб у одной и той же девушки. Проверь: цвет волос идентичный, различается только длина.
contrastPairs.promptBase: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, toned athletic build with defined shoulders and waist, {long wavy dark-brown hair | a sleek chin-length dark-brown bob}, wearing a fitted white ribbed tank top and high-waist track pants, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw --seed 41004
contrastPairs.technique: Same seed + cref; swap only the hair-length descriptor.

contrastPairs.briefRu: Уточняет: стиль. Платье vs edgy-одежда на одной девушке. Проверь: лицо/волосы/фигура совпадают, меняется только одежда (макияж НЕ меняется).
contrastPairs.promptBase: candid unposed photo of a 24-year-old woman taken by a friend on a smartphone, slender petite build, long wavy dark-brown hair, wearing {a simple fitted black slip dress with thin straps | a black band t-shirt with rolled short sleeves, layered silver necklaces and dark jeans}, bare arms with no tattoos, leaning casually against the bar counter of a cozy warmly-lit café in the evening, softly blurred empty café background with no other people, warm ambient light, three-quarter framing from mid-thigh up, slightly tilted imperfect amateur framing, looking at the camera with a light genuine smile as if greeting someone she came to meet, natural minimal makeup, realistic skin texture, naturally attractive girl-next-door look, not model-glamorous, authentic unfiltered phone-camera snapshot feel, no professional lighting --ar 3:4 --style raw --seed 41005
